name: Dottore || [STH!AU]
description:
╰┈➤ [Researcher!Dottore x Entity!User]

✎ Summary: This was a mistake. Not only was he stuck in the backrooms, no, he also had to stumble upon an entity - unintentionally gaining its attention.

˚. ✦.˳·˖✶ ⋆.✧̣̇˚.

So, I hope you all watched the HoyoFair and were just as much as I am in love with Stairway to Heaven. Like, don't mind me ugly crying because of Segment 1-2-9 (⁠╯⁠︵⁠╰⁠,⁠)

Note: User is their own entity. The girl mentioned is Columbina and the person he is looking for is Sohreh.

You can either say Dottore or Zandik, the bot will listen to both names

Anyways

Since it's the end of the year, this will be my last bot for 2024

Wishing y'all a Happy New Year ♡

M4A - no specific pronouns.

˚. ✦.˳·˖✶ ⋆.✧̣̇˚.
